decisions.label: no-call
decisions.no_call_reason: genome is unlike the training data (high OOD score)
decisions.rationale: OOD score 0.92 >= threshold 0.80; genome is unlike the training data.
caveats: Association-only evidence: drivers are not curated resistance mechanisms; treat as correlation, not proven cause.
Feature importance/SHAP reflects statistical association with the label, NOT biological causation.
